ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Continued To Oct-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Byron Sun appeared by zoom for administrator.

Mr. Sun stated that the decedent is an heir to another case (Estate of Filomen T. Palero, Sr. PES-23-306050), that a petition for final distribution in that matter is set for August 7th and that he will need an appraisal from the referee. Status on close of estate is continued to October 1, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If this estate is not ready for final distribution by then, Mr. Sun is to file a petition for approval of a report on status of administration two weeks prior by September 17, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.
